criteria.title: Test integrity and regression signal

evidence.label: CI workflow runs the test suite

findings.summary: Test suite files are present, but no coverage configuration was detected.

metrics.name: test_to_source_ratio
metrics.label: Test-to-source file ratio
metrics.description: Measures how much concrete test surface exists relative to implementation surface.

metrics.name: coverage_percent
metrics.label: Static coverage percentage
metrics.description: Uses a static coverage report value or configured threshold when present, without running tests.

metrics.name: verification_script_ratio
metrics.label: Verification script ratio
metrics.description: Measures explicit test/lint/typecheck verification commands (via npm script or CI-invoked tool) plus test runner configuration.

metrics.name: non_hollow_test_share
metrics.label: Non-hollow test share
metrics.description: Penalizes skipped or placeholder-only test files; test-directory support scaffolding (helpers/fixtures with no test in them) is excluded from the denominator.

criteria.notes: A1 is detected from real test files, test runner configuration, and optional coverage configuration.

criteria.title: Data-layer isolation and secrets posture

findings.summary: Secret-shaped value in a test/fixture file (src/witan/__tests__/repo-signals.test.ts) — likely fixture data, not a production leak; verify.

A secret/HMAC/signature comparison via plain equality appears in a test/fixture file (src/witan/__tests__/lua-rubric-refinements.test.ts) — likely a test assertion, not a production timing leak; verify.

metrics.name: secret_cleanliness
metrics.label: Secret cleanliness
metrics.description: Credits absence of committed or recent-history secret findings in the static scan.

metrics.name: env_handling_depth
metrics.label: Environment handling depth
metrics.description: Counts three bounded env-handling practices (0–3): template file, gitignore rule, env reads in any supported language.

metrics.name: crypto_comparison_hygiene
metrics.label: Crypto comparison hygiene
metrics.description: Credits constant-time secret/HMAC comparison and canonical serialization before signing when a signing/HMAC surface is detected in source; only scored when such a surface exists.

criteria.notes: History secret scanning covers all reachable git history for credential-pattern paths unless the explicit credential-blob safety valve is reported.

findings.summary: A3 metric-derived score is 2.3/4.0, in the warning band — no single finding drove this; it reflects the combined metric weighting below.

metrics.name: prod_readiness_primitives
metrics.label: Production-readiness primitive coverage
metrics.description: Counts distinct static production-readiness primitives instead of treating presence as enough.

metrics.name: prod_workflow_depth
metrics.label: Production workflow depth
metrics.description: Measures CI/deploy configuration depth instead of a single CI-present bit.

metrics.name: observability_depth
metrics.label: Observability depth
metrics.description: Counts static observability/logging/metrics implementation signals.

metrics.name: rollback_safety_depth
metrics.label: Rollback and migration-safety depth
metrics.description: Counts static rollback or migration-safety artifacts.

criteria.title: Dependency hygiene

findings.summary: A4 metric-derived score is 1.8/4.0, in the warning band — no single finding drove this; it reflects the combined metric weighting below.

metrics.name: pinned_dependency_ratio
metrics.label: Pinned dependency ratio
metrics.description: Measures exact/static dependency versions in manifests; lower weight because a lockfile is the primary reproducibility guarantee.

metrics.name: lockfile_coverage
metrics.label: Lockfile coverage
metrics.description: Credits presence of at least one lockfile; one root lockfile covering a monorepo is sufficient.

metrics.name: dependency_automation_ratio
metrics.label: Dependency automation ratio
metrics.description: Credits automated dependency updates and package-manager audit hooks.

criteria.notes: A4 scored against app/service norms (deploy surface detected): pinned dependencies and a lockfile are required for reproducible installs.

findings.summary: Claim source and implementation files are present, but no dedicated claim-reality report artifact was supplied.

metrics.name: claim_match_rate
metrics.label: Claim match rate
metrics.description: Uses bounded implementation-to-claim-source depth as a static proxy when no dedicated artifact exists.

metrics.name: claim_source_depth
metrics.label: Claim source depth
metrics.description: Credits multiple claim-bearing documents without judging unverified prose as truth.

metrics.name: reconciliation_artifact_depth
metrics.label: Reconciliation artifact depth
metrics.description: Requires a specific claim-reality artifact to reach full depth.

criteria.title: Internal process dimension
criteria.notes: Substrate-specific: an internal process dimension is not applicable to external code.

metrics.name: pr_trace_primitives
metrics.label: PR trace primitive coverage
metrics.description: Measures CI, PR template, and review-gate evidence for pull-request traceability.

metrics.name: pr_merge_ratio
metrics.label: Recent PR merge ratio
metrics.description: Uses bounded git history as a deterministic proxy for PR outcome traceability.

findings.summary: B3 metric-derived score is 2.4/4.0, in the warning band — no single finding drove this; it reflects the combined metric weighting below.

metrics.name: ci_script_depth
metrics.label: CI verification depth
metrics.description: Counts npm verification scripts plus distinct test/lint/typecheck/build command categories detected anywhere in CI workflows; language-agnostic, counted by category not by file.

metrics.name: default_branch_ci_depth
metrics.label: PR-gate CI workflow count
metrics.description: Counts CI workflows that target pull requests or the default branch, up to 4.

criteria.title: Audit trail and report-up completeness
criteria.notes: No audit-trail artifact detected (CHANGELOG/CHANGES/HISTORY/NEWS/SECURITY/AUDIT/STATUS/ release-notes/runbook/provenance file) — B4 not applicable to this repo.

criteria.title: Internal process dimension
criteria.notes: Substrate-specific: an internal process dimension is not applicable to external code.

criteria.title: Privileged-operation human gating

evidence.label: Fail-closed privilege-membership check before role elevation

metrics.name: human_gate_documented
metrics.label: Human gate documented
metrics.description: Credits explicit documentation that privileged/credentialed operations are human-executed, never agent-run.

metrics.name: fail_closed_privilege_check
metrics.label: Fail-closed privilege check present
metrics.description: Credits code that checks role membership and fails closed before elevating privilege, instead of attempting elevation blind.

metrics.name: privilege_escalation_cleanliness
metrics.label: Privilege-escalation cleanliness
metrics.description: Penalizes code that executes a role-membership GRANT or SUPERUSER escalation with no documented human gate (test/fixture files are downgraded findings, not penalized here).

metrics.name: protected_path_review_gate
metrics.label: Protected-path review gate
metrics.description: Credits a CODEOWNERS file or documented required-review/branch-protection policy — the general OSS-observable analogue of human-gating changes to sensitive paths.

criteria.notes: B6 rewards documented, fail-closed human gating of privileged/credentialed operations and penalizes ungated privilege-escalation code paths.
